title: ismelia carinata
intro: Ismelia carinata, also known as Dhamasa or Wild Banyan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, among others. Ismelia carinata is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
